title: micromeria filiformis subsp. minutifolia
intro: Micromeria filiformis subsp. minutifolia, also known as the small-leaved thyme, is a subspecies of the micromeria filiformis plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. The medicinal properties of Micromeria filiformis subsp. minutifolia have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Micromeria filiformis subsp. minutifolia can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
